intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 15:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 115%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 5:00 at 106-115% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 1/5. You're starting fresh. Set the standard for the rest of the workout.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 5 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 115% for 5:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 28% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 25 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/5. 3 to go. You've accumulated 5min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/5. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/5. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/5. 115% FTP × 5:00. Seated. 3 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 5:00. Then 35min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 50% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 5:00 at 115%. Then 5:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 50% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 50% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. 115% for 5:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 5:00. Then 25min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 57% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 5:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/5. You're 64% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 64% complete. 115% for 5:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 90-100 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 reps left. 20 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 1 reps to go. Your body is writing a strongly worded letter. You won't read it until after cooldown.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 64% into session. 115% at 90-100 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 50 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 50 minutes of work done. 15 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 71% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 71% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last one. Your body is lying — you have more. Prove it. Then you can rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 106-115% FTP, 90-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 10 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. 5:00 at 115%. Then 10 minutes to contemplate your life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 106-115% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 85% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 85% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 85% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 85% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
